personal.name: Khaled Esam
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast
personal.summary: Passionate full-stack developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-powered solutions. I specialize in modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems and have a strong interest in machine learning and natural language processing. I thrive on solving complex problems and delivering clean, maintainable code.

experience.description: Design and implementation of scalable backend services using NestJS, along with responsive frontend development using React.js and TypeScript. Integrated Supabase for authentication, database management, and serverless backend capabilities.
Architecting backend services for an enterprise platform using NestJS. Developing secure REST APIs with authentication, authorization, and role-based access control.
Developed a custom CMS and administrative dashboards for a construction and engineering services company. Implemented full MERN stack solutions to support business workflows and data management.
Developed scalable frontend features using React.js and implemented backend services using Laravel and MySQL. Optimized database queries and application logic, improving performance by up to 70%.

projects.name: Exolex Firm SaaS Backend
projects.description: Scalable backend system for a law firm built with NestJS and PostgreSQL. Designed using Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles with clear separation of domain, application, and infrastructure layers.

projects.name: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.description: Low-latency chat system built with NestJS and WebSockets supporting room-based messaging and real-time event broadcasting. Includes message persistence using PostgreSQL and TypeORM.

projects.name: Target for Engineering Web Application
projects.description: Single-page application for an engineering services company with authentication using Auth0 and backend services built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate — Amazon Web Services
careerGoals: I aim to advance as a backend and full-stack engineer by designing scalable, secure, and high-performance systems. I am particularly interested in backend architecture, distributed systems, and cloud-based platforms. Long-term, I aspire to contribute to large-scale products, mentor other developers, and continuously deepen my expertise in system design and software architecture.
